message: Software engineering roles generally require a technical degree and a minimum CGPA of 6.5.
Data Science roles often strictly screen for quantitative backgrounds and 7.0+ CGPA.
UPSC strictly requires completing Graduation. No strict CGPA cutoff.
SSC CGL strictly requires a Graduation degree. 12th pass are not eligible.
Banking PO roles require Graduation and sometimes a minimum of 50-60%.
NDA requires 12th pass (PCM for Air Force/Navy).
